From these tempest-thrones thundered the Storm Welders: atmospheric archons welding weathers, electrocuting rebellions and blood-breaks with plasma-pikes. Zephyrs zoned ziggurats, tempest-titans towering thunderheads; the yoked yowled yokes, or shredded to sleet.

Across atmospheric aeons, Welders worsened wickeder—gale-governors gashing grudges, forefather-flashes forging fealties, burnished by bolt-ballads. Rites roared raunchier: soul-squalls, oath-updrafts, alloying auras across altitudes aflame.
